news.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in Strait of Hormuz after U.S. extends ceasefire
news.summary: The attacks come shortly after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would extend the ceasefire with Iran to allow peace talks to continue. The attacks come after the president said the ceasefire would be extended until the end of the year.

news.title: Boeing CEO says 'all systems are go' to increase 737 production as company narrows loss
news.summary: Boeing expects certification of new Max 7 and 10 models later this year. Deliveries start in 2027, with the Max 7 expected to go on sale in 2018.

news.title: Google unveils chips for AI training and inference in latest shot at Nvidia
news.summary: Google is packing ample amounts of static random access memory into a dedicated chip for running artificial intelligence models. Google is following in the footsteps of Nvidia, which also has a dedicated AI chip.

news.title: United Airlines slashes 2026 forecast as fuel costs surge, but demand remains strong
news.summary: The carrier's first-quarter earnings topped Wall Street's expectations. The company also reported better-than-expected results for the second quarter.

news.title: Retail traders can now get long OpenAI as Robinhood's venture fund takes a stake
news.summary: Robinhood's proprietary investment vehicle has taken a $75 million stake in OpenAI. The trading company announced Wednesday that it would be investing in the AI company.

news.title: I went to an Advanced Placement personal-finance class. Here’s what I learned.
news.summary: Financial literacy will get serious treatment in high schools starting next year. It will be part of the AP’s new ‘Career Kickstart’ bundle.

news.title: ‘Some stocks have risen, but others have flopped’: I will soon inherit my parents’ $1.5 million estate. Do I fire the adviser who charges a 3% fee?
news.summary: “This broker does not achieve returns better than the S&P 500,” he says. “It’s not a good investment.” He adds: “I don’t think the market is interested in it.’

news.title: ‘The Lord has taken care of me’: I’m 74. I went from earning $14 an hour to retiring with $3.4 million. Here’s how I did it.
news.summary: “I have always thought that I did not have any real talents or skills,” she said. “I’ve always thought I was not very good at anything.”

news.title: I paid $4,500 instead of filing an insurance claim. Here’s when you should do the same.
news.summary: Don’t Short Yourself Live is CNN Tech’s weekly, offbeat look at the world around us. This week, Jarrett looks at how to save on insurance as premiums skyrocket. Plus, we talk about cutting college costs.

news.title: Happy 54½ birthday to me! I’m now exactly 5 years from retirement. Here’s what I’ll do first to prepare.
news.summary: This could be my most consequential age milestone, because it’s the ideal time for me to start detailed planning for my golden years.
